title: Route registry targets resolve or are honestly marked planned
Knowledge-map route ids and the routing manifest ids are in bijection
Metric contract with an unresolved assumption also carries a settled binding
No module-scope DB/network import in the static core (never-execute)
No module-scope DB/network import in a live-surface module (keep it lazy)
Connection must use parameter identifiers, not string literals
Each measure must have a /// doc comment
Each measure must have a displayFolder
Prefer explicit measures over implicit aggregation
Partitions must source from gold schema only
No hardcoded date literals in measures
Parked-on dependency edges reconcile with tracked-file evidence
No real host/value in committed PBIP parameters
Committed publish/handoff pack has every required section filled
PBIR model reference must be relative
Readiness status files are internally consistent
gold dim -1 unknown member (enforces ADR RC14)
date dim has no -1/NULL unknown member (marked date table)
Prose status claims reconcile with tracked-file evidence
Committed KPI coverage scorecard is structurally well-formed
